% Archetype: structured

\documentclass[11pt,twoside,openany]{book}

\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\usepackage{emptypage}

\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}
}

\geometry{
  paperwidth=6in,
  paperheight=9in,
  top=0.95in,
  bottom=1.15in,
  left=0.98in,
  right=0.98in
}

\defaultfontfeatures{Ligatures=TeX}
\setmainfont{Latin Modern Roman}

$if(title)$$else$\errmessage{Radial Timeline export requires Pandoc metadata: title}$endif$
$if(author)$$else$\errmessage{Radial Timeline export requires Pandoc metadata: author}$endif$
\newcommand{\BookTitle}{$if(title)$$title$$endif$}
\newcommand{\AuthorName}{$if(author)$$for(author)$$author$$sep$, $endfor$$endif$}
\newcommand{\rtSceneRunningTitle}{}
\newcommand{\rtSetSceneRunningTitle}[1]{\gdef\rtSceneRunningTitle{#1}\markboth{\BookTitle}{#1}}
\fancypagestyle{rtEmpty}{\fancyhf{}\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
\fancyhead[CE]{\thepage\hspace{1em}|\hspace{1em}\AuthorName}
\fancyhead[CO]{\BookTitle\hspace{1em}|\hspace{1em}\thepage}
\fancyhead[LE]{}
\fancyhead[RE]{}
\fancyhead[LO]{}
\fancyhead[RO]{}
\pagestyle{fancy}

\pagenumbering{roman}
\newif\ifrtMainStarted
\rtMainStartedfalse
\newcommand{\rtBeginMainArabic}{%
  \clearpage
  \pagenumbering{arabic}%
  \setcounter{page}{1}%
  \rtMainStartedtrue%
}

\newcommand{\rtPart}[3]{%
  \ifrtMainStarted\else\rtBeginMainArabic\fi%
  \clearpage
  \null%
  \thispagestyle{rtEmpty}%
  \vspace*{1.55in}%
  \begin{center}
    {\normalfont\bfseries\Large #1}\par
    \vspace{0.16in}%
    \rule{0.46in}{0.4pt}\par
    \ifstrempty{#2}{}{%%
      \vspace{0.28in}%
      \begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
        \centering
        {\itshape #2}\par
      \end{minipage}\par
    }%
    \ifstrempty{#3}{}{%%
      \vspace{0.18in}{\small\MakeUppercase{---#3}}\par
    }%
  \end{center}
  \vspace*{1.2in}%
  \clearpage
}

\newcommand{\rtChapter}[2]{%
  \ifrtMainStarted\else\rtBeginMainArabic\fi%
  \clearpage
  \refstepcounter{chapter}%
  \null%
  \thispagestyle{rtEmpty}%
  \vspace*{0.20\textheight}%
  \begin{center}
    {\normalfont\bfseries\small Chapter~#1}\par
    \vspace{0.35in}%
    {\normalfont\LARGE #2}\par
  \end{center}
  \vspace*{0.08\textheight}%
  \clearpage
}

\newcommand{\rtSceneSep}[1]{%
  \ifrtMainStarted\else\rtBeginMainArabic\fi%
  \clearpage
  \null%
  \thispagestyle{rtEmpty}%
  \vspace*{0.78in}%
  \begin{center}
    {\normalfont\small #1.}\par
    \vspace{0.08in}%
    \rule{0.46in}{0.4pt}%
  \end{center}
  \vspace*{0.82in}%
}

\setstretch{1.18}
\usepackage{microtype}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{3em}
\tolerance=1000
\hyphenpenalty=200

\begin{document}

$body$

\end{document}
